headline: Iran Mulls Trump's 14-Point PEACE PILL рҹҚҶрҹ“ңрҹ’Ұ
text:
White House рҹҸӣпёҸрҹҳҺ SLIDIN' into Iran's DMs рҹ“ұрҹ’Ң with a THICC 14-POINT MEMO рҹ“қрҹҚ‘ that's got TEHRAN рҹӨҜрҹ’ӯ 'STILL CONSIDERING' the deets! Axios рҹ“°рҹ”Ҙ SPILLIN' TEA вҳ• that Biden's ghost рҹ‘» or whoever's runnin' the show thinks they're CLOSIN' IN рҹ«Ӯ on ENDIN' this HOT MESS рҹ”Ҙрҹ’Ҙ war вҖ“ suspend NUKES вҳўпёҸрҹҡ«, LIFT SANCTIONS рҹӨ‘рҹ“Ҳ, FREE Strait of Hormuz рҹҡўрҹҢҠ OIL ORGY 20% GLOBAL JUICE рҹӣўпёҸрҹ’Ұ flowin' BRRRR! Pakistan рҹҮөрҹҮ° brokered MEDIATORS рҹ•ҠпёҸ tryna turn CEASEFIRE рҹҳӨ into PERMA-PEACE рҹ‘‘, FM sayin' 'WE GOTCHU' рҹӨқрҹ”Ҙ!

Trump рҹҚҠрҹ—Ҫ DADDY drop BOMBS рҹ’Јрҹ“ў on Truth Social: 'VERY GOOD TALKS рҹҳҳрҹ’¬ with Iran LAST 24HRS вҢҡ вҖ“ DEAL POSSIBLE, I THINK WE WON рҹҸҶрҹҳӨ!' Pausin' Project Freedom рҹҡўрҹӣЎпёҸ cuz Iran's givin' UP NUKES вҳўпёҸвқҢ 'AMONG OTHER THINGS' рҹ‘Җ вҖ“ Tehran like 'NAH BRO рҹӨЁ', Parliament simp Ebrahim Rezaei X-postin' 'US LOSIN' BAD рҹҳ©рҹ“ү, our FINGER ON TRIGGER рҹ”«рҹҳҲ вҖ“ SURRENDER OR REGRET SLAP рҹ’Ҙрҹ‘Ӣ!' Trump clappin' back: 'NO DEAL? BOMBIN' RESUMES HARDER рҹҳЎрҹ’Ј вҖ“ Operation Epic Fury рҹҢӘпёҸрҹҚҶ OVER if you BEND OVER рҹ“ңрҹҚ‘!'

IRGC рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҮ®рҹҮ· TEA-SIP: Strait REOPENS рҹҡўвң… if aggressors CHILL рҹҡ«рҹ”Ҙ! US CENTCOM рҹ’ӘрҹҰ… just DISABLED Iranian tanker рҹӣіпёҸрҹ’Ҙ tryna bust BLOCKADE in Gulf of Oman рҹҢҠвҡ”пёҸ вҖ“ DOZENS STOPPED, no cap! Bibi Netanyahu рҹҰҒрҹҮ®рҹҮұ syncin' FULLY рҹӨқрҹҚҠ with Trump: 'REMOVE ALL ENRICHED GOO вҳўпёҸрҹ—‘пёҸ, SMASH capabilities рҹ”Ё вҖ“ NO SURPRISES рҹ‘Җ!' Then Israel рҹ’Ј BEIRUT рҹҡҖ first post-ceasefire HIT on Hezbollah boss рҹҺҜрҹҳө вҖ“ 'He fired at our settlements, IDF HURT рҹҳў' вҖ“ Hezbollah Iran-puppet рҹӨЎрҹҮ®рҹҮ· rocket/dronin' back рҹҰҫрҹ’Ҙ northern Israel/Lebanon since March MADNESS!

Ceasefire? WHAT CEASEFIRE рҹҳӮрҹӨЎ вҖ“ Drones/missiles paused on UAE рҹҮҰрҹҮӘ but Strait STILL CLOGGED рҹҡ«рҹӣўпёҸ, US ports BLOCKED Iran too! Rubio рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј said Epic Fury DONE вң… objectives MET, Trump PAUSIN' Freedom to NORMIE ECONOMY рҹӨ‘рҹ“Ҳ oil flow. Iran FM spokesman Ismail Baghaei рҹ“ў: 'REVIEWIN' US PROPOSAL рҹӨ”, tellin' Pakistan OUR TAKE SOON рҹ‘Ң!' Sources anon AF рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ leakin' it's FRAMEWORK for NUCLEAR DEETS рҹ§ вҳўпёҸ вҖ“ contingent on FINAL BANG рҹ’Ҙрҹ“ң! Wall Street simps рҹӨ‘рҹ“ү prayin' for NO MORE OIL SPIKE рҹ“ҲрҹӣўпёҸ, Trump like 'THEY WANNA DEAL BBY рҹҳҚ, WE THRUSTIN' TO VICTORY рҹҸҶрҹҚҶ!' Bibi/Trump bromance рҹ”Ҙрҹ‘¬ ENDGAME: Denuke Iran, FREE THE STRAIT, GLOBAL ECO MOON рҹҡҖрҹ’° вҖ“ or WW3 ORGY рҹ’Ұвҡ”пёҸ? STAY TUNED рҹ“әрҹҳұ!
